description: Sign up and complete the Hub onboarding profile
steps: Navigate to hub.getsolo.tech and click Sign Up
Fill in your details and accept the Terms & Code of Conduct
Complete the one-time profile onboarding (required before any Hub access)
explanation: Hub requires a complete profile before you can do anything. If you signed up via a shared model link, it redirects you back after setup.
expected_outcome: You are logged in and land on the Hub catalog or the page you originally came from

validation.rule: Hub navbar shows your username and the credit balance in the top bar

common_errors: Signed up via shared link — Hub will redirect back automatically after onboarding

description: Verify your email address to unlock gated features
steps: Look for the verification banner at the top of every Hub page
Click 'Resend Verification Email' in the banner
Click the link in the email
explanation: Email verification is required before you can: join or create a team organization, manage billing and purchase credits, generate API tokens.
expected_outcome: Banner disappears; gated features (billing, teams, API tokens) become accessible

validation.rule: The verification banner no longer appears at the top of Hub pages

common_errors: No email received — wait a few minutes and try resending. Check spam folder.
Email address wrong — verify and correct under Settings → Profile
Link expired — resend from the banner

description: Update display name or interest tags in Settings
steps: Update your full name or add/remove interest tags
explanation: Username is permanent after onboarding and cannot be changed (ensures all model URLs and team references stay stable). Only name and tags are editable.
expected_outcome: Changes reflected in your profile display

validation.rule: Updated name visible in Settings → Profile page

common_errors: Trying to change username — this is permanently locked after onboarding by design
